name: Integrated Tech Bus Svc
recent_news: No public footprint located as a school-bus operator. The website listed (itbs.us) maps to Integrated Technology Business Services, an IT services firm in Kalamazoo, which appears to be name-collision/mis-enrichment rather than a school transportation contractor.
fit_notes: Cannot validate as an operating school-bus contractor; listed website is an unrelated IT firm. Likely too small/unverifiable to qualify as a Summit tuck-in target without ground truth via Michigan DOE/MSP school-bus inspection rolls.

name: Richland Center Bus Svc
recent_news: No verifiable public footprint as a Michigan school-bus operator. The website tag (kobussen.com) points to Kobussen Buses Ltd of Richland Center, Wisconsin — a different company in a different state — suggesting mis-enriched data. Battle Creek Public Schools (49037 ZIP) is served by Dean Transportation, not by an entity named Richland Center Bus Service.
fit_notes: Record appears to be a small/legacy filing or data artifact; cannot confirm existence as an independent Michigan operator. Not actionable as a tuck-in target without additional confirmation from MI DOT/MSP carrier rolls.

name: Keller Bus Svc
recent_news: No public footprint found for a 'Keller Bus Service' operating school transportation in Boise. The Boise School District is served by Durham School Services (Summit/National Express platform), and West Ada by its own district fleet. The website tag (landismarket.com) is unrelated (a market). Likely defunct, micro-scale, or mis-enriched data.
fit_notes: Cannot validate as an active independent operator. Idaho's Boise market is largely covered by Durham (platform incumbent), reducing tuck-in optionality; this micro-record is not a credible target.

name: Alltown Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility (Audax Private Equity / Audax Group)
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility on June 14, 2022, joining the Audax-backed Beacon platform. In Jan 2024 awarded 40 electric school buses from EPA Clean School Bus Program for the Decatur location. Operates 700+ buses across seven locations (Chicago north/south, Skokie, Harvey, Decatur, Davenport IA, Detroit MI).
fit_notes: DISQUALIFIED as a tuck-in. Alltown is a PE-owned (Beacon Mobility/Audax) platform competitor to Summit and the Decatur address is one Alltown branch, not an independent company. Not actionable.

name: North Iowa Bus Co Inc
principals: Richard Dolack (Mason City branch manager per Cavalier site)
recent_news: Family-owned since the early 1960s; Bill Regan started with 4 buses in LeRoy MN, won the Owatonna MN contract in 1967, expanded into Mason City IA around 1999. Son John P. Regan now runs the operation, and grandson John joined the Mason City branch in 2009 after USAF service. Operates ~200+ school buses across MN and IA plus 15 motor coaches under sister brand Cavalier Coaches.
fit_notes: Genuine family-owned, multi-generational IA/MN school-bus + motorcoach platform (~200 buses) under the Regan family / Agnes Corporation umbrella. Multi-district contracts, second/third generation management — credible mid-size tuck-in / regional anchor candidate for Summit's Midwest expansion. Worth a confidential approach via the Mason City and Owatonna leadership.
